summary:
The concurrency bug is clear: `incrementCounter` uses a read-modify-write sequence, which is not atomic and leads to lost updates with simultaneous requests. To fix this, I’ll rewrite the increment to use Redis’s `INCR` command so the operation is atomic.

I’ll update `incrementCounter` in `app/counter.js` to use `client.incr(COUNTER_KEY)` instead of the manual read-update-write sequence.
